detail.notFoundDescription: This tag may have been deleted or you may have followed a broken link.
detail.deleteDescription: The tag "{{name}}" will be sent to the trash and hidden from all tasks, projects, and documents that use it. You can restore it from Settings → Trash before the retention period ends.
